queries.question: For each orchestra, can you list the types of instruments there?
queries.sql: select orchestras.orchestra_name , instruments.instrument_type from Orchestras_Instruments join Instruments on Orchestras_Instruments.instrument_id = Instruments.id join Orchestras on Orchestras_Instruments.orchestra_id = Orchestras.id
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/entertainment#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/entertainment/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?orchestra_name ?instrument_type WHERE {
  ?orchestras_instruments a :Orchestras_Instruments .
  ?instruments a :Instrument .
  ?orchestras_instruments p:hasInstruments ?instruments .
  ?orchestras a :Orchestras .
  ?orchestras_instruments p:hasOrchestras ?orchestras .
  ?orchestras p:orchestra_name ?orchestra_name .
  ?instruments p:instrument_type ?instrument_type .
}

queries.question: What kind of instruments does each orchestra have?
queries.sql: SELECT Instruments.instrument_type  from Orchestras_Instruments join Instruments on Orchestras_Instruments.instrument_id = Instruments.id join Orchestras on Orchestras_Instruments.orchestra_id = Orchestras.id   GROUP BY Orchestras_Instruments.instrument_id HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Orchestras_Instruments.orchestra_id) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Orchestras)

ambiguous_dsl.question: What kind of instruments does each orchestra have?
